summary: Created soundness_dense theorem scaffold with frame constraints. Wired all base axiom cases and most rule cases. Blocked on temporal_duality (mutual recursion termination) and IRR (pre-existing IRRSoundness errors). 2 sorries remain in soundness_dense, original 6 sorries in soundness unchanged.

Added soundness_dense theorem with 2 remaining sorries

review_reason: 2 sorries remain in soundness_dense theorem (temporal_duality, irr). Blocking issues: (1) temporal_duality requires mutual recursion with termination proof, (2) IRR case blocked by pre-existing IRRSoundness.lean build errors.
